zh.Sneyd, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯尼德
zh.lifeSummary: Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh於1232年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾。她於1249年與Richard de Snede在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1270年在她的家鄉享年38歲。

zh-hans.Sneyd, Staffordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯尼德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh于1232年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾。她于1249年与Richard de Snede在英国英格兰斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1270年在她的家乡享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stonleigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Stoneley
meanings: English: locative name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwicks), or Stonely (Hunts).  Compare  Stanley  .

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

variants.name: Joannah

en.lifeSummary: Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh was born in 1232, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Richard de Snede in 1249, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1270, in her hometown, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh est née en 1232, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Richard de Snede en 1249, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1270, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh wurde 1232 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1249 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Richard de Snede geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1270 im Alter von 38 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh è nata il nel 1232 nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Richard de Snede nel 1249, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1270, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.Sneyd, Staffordshire, England: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスニード
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleighは1232年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた。1249年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアでRichard de Snedeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1270年に故郷で38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh(은)는 1232년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1249년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 Richard de Snede(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1270년 그녀의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh nasceu em 1232, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Richard de Snede em 1249, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1270, em sua cidade natal, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh родилась в 1232 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Snede в 1249 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1270 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh nació en 1232, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Richard de Snede en 1249, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1270, en su pueblo, a la edad de 38 años.
